overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a futuristic cyberpunk city showing a train ride through heavy rain at night. The camera, positioned inside an elevated metro car, travels past neon-lit skyscrapers, approaches Wellsprings station, and navigates through tight urban canyons with prominent red neon lighting and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro line through downtown canyon

agents.ego_description: riding an elevated train through heavy rain, observing the illuminated cyberpunk cityscape through the rain-streaked window

rows of empty metro seats visible inside the train car
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows
large illuminated advertisement sign atop a distant skyscraper

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside a metro train traveling through a rainy cyberpunk city at night. Through the rain-streaked window, clusters of illuminated skyscrapers and neon billboards are visible in the distance while the train interior remains dimly lit and empty.

events.description: train approaches Wellsprings station platform, station signage becomes visible on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing on the metro train as it slows approaching the station platform, observing the concrete infrastructure

entered.detail: concrete platform edge with safety barriers of the Wellsprings station
illuminated red and white sign reading 'METRO: WELLSPRINGS' with directional arrow

segments.scene_description: The train approaches the Wellsprings station platform, transitioning from the open city canyon to the station zone. The platform edge and station signage become prominent on the left side while the train continues moving through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight urban canyon between high-rise buildings

events.description: train enters narrow corridor passing extremely close to building with prominent vertical red neon lighting
passing large digital billboards and elevated pedestrian walkways in the dense city canyon

agents.ego_description: riding through a narrow urban canyon with close-up views of building facades, bright red neon lights, and digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall building facade with bright red vertical neon light strip running down the exterior wall
large vertical digital screen displaying a pink neon face advertisement
covered pedestrian walkway connecting two buildings across the urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The train enters a tight urban canyon, passing extremely close to a building with a prominent vertical red neon light. The space becomes narrow and enclosed with digital billboards appearing on the left and elevated walkways visible ahead, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from inside a metro train as it travels from an open, rainy cityscape into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins with a view through rain-streaked windows, looking out at distant clusters of illuminated skyscrapers and neon billboards under a dark night sky. As the train progresses, the open vista narrows and the scene shifts toward the Wellsprings station, where the platform edge and station signage emerge prominently on the left. The environment then tightens further as the train enters a dense urban corridor, passing extremely close to a building marked by a vertical red neon light. Finally, the space becomes fully enclosed by digital billboards and elevated walkways, intensifying the oppressive cyberpunk atmosphere.
